$schema: Centralized allowlist for anti-simulation guardrail. Every entry MUST include reason and ref (issue/PR id). Set `dist: true` for entries that apply to the built bundle scanner.

entries.reason: React internals (event listener key, fiber id) and @supabase localStorage probe use Math.random for non-medical, non-signal-path identifier generation. Verified: zero references reach src/modules/signal-processing/** or src/modules/vital-signs/**.
Legitimate UI feature: random guidance message selection for varied user experience. pick<T>() selects random element from guidance templates array for UX variety, not for medical signal processing.
